title: Brave at Bedtime
lesson: The dark isn't scary when you feel cozy and safe; you can be brave.
prompts: In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} sits up on the bed hugging the teddy bear, looking a little unsure about the dark. A soft warm glow fills the room. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} sits in the mid-ground on the bed, with a slightly worried expression, still hugging the teddy bear. In the foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} kneels beside the bed reaching toward a small night-light, smiling warmly and reassuringly. Make the interaction read physically: the man's reaching hand and gaze go to the small night-light while the child watches the man's hand at the night-light. Gentle warm light. Exactly one child and one adult in the frame, and no other people.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} sits on the bed, with a calmer expression, hugging the teddy bear. Nearby, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_PARENT} leans in tucking a soft blanket around them, smiling gently. Make the interaction read physically: the man's hands tuck the soft blanket around the child while both look toward the blanket between them. Warm glowing light. Exactly one child and one adult in the frame, and no other people.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} lies back alone on the pillow with the teddy bear beside them, calmer now. Warm glowing light. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} snuggles down alone under the blanket, hugging the teddy bear with a small brave smile. Warm glowing light. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.

In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening — a comfy bed, a small teddy bear — now softly lit by a glowing night-light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY} rests peacefully alone on the pillow with the teddy bear tucked close and a content, peaceful expression, no longer afraid of the dark. Warm glowing light. Exactly one child in the frame, and no other people.
gists: In a cozy child's bedroom in the evening, the child sits up on the bed hugging a teddy bear, looking unsure about the dark, in a soft warm glow.
In the evening bedroom, the child sits on the bed hugging the teddy, a little worried, while the father kneels reaching toward a small night-light to switch it on.
In the bedroom now softly lit by the night-light, the child sits on the bed calmer, hugging the teddy, while the father leans in tucking a blanket around them.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child lies back alone on the pillow with the teddy beside them, calmer now.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child snuggles down alone under the blanket hugging the teddy with a small brave smile.
In the night-light-lit bedroom, the child rests peacefully alone on the pillow with the teddy close, content and no longer afraid of the dark.
texts: It was bedtime. {NAME} sat up in bed hugging a teddy, feeling unsure about the dark. "It's so dark in here," {NAME} whispered.
"I'm a little bit scared," said {NAME}. Dad knelt down. "Let's switch on your night-light," he said softly, and click — on it glowed.
The room filled with a warm, cosy glow. "That's better, isn't it?" said Dad, tucking the blanket in snug. "Much better," said {NAME}.
{NAME} lay back on the soft pillow with teddy close by. "The dark isn't so scary now," {NAME} said quietly.
{NAME} snuggled down and gave a brave little smile. "I can be brave," {NAME} whispered to teddy.
Soon {NAME} rested, calm and cosy, not afraid at all. "Goodnight," murmured {NAME}. Safe and snug, {NAME} was brave.
